hero.title: Manage your school, simply.
hero.subtitle: Enrollments, grades, Mobile Money payments, report cards, timetables — all in one platform. Built for Guinea.

problem.title: Challenges facing Guinean schools
problem.subtitle: Daily problems that hinder education quality

paper.title: Lost paper records
paper.description: Paper registers lost, incomplete, or difficult to access. Years of school data at risk.

visibility.title: No parent visibility
visibility.description: Parents have no visibility on their children's grades and absences. Limited communication with the school.

payments.title: Chaotic payments
payments.description: Payment management is chaotic between cash and Mobile Money. Manual reconciliation causes errors.

communication.title: Difficult communication
communication.description: Teacher-parent communication is non-existent or difficult. No structured channel for exchanges.

solution.title: Kouroukan, your solution
solution.subtitle: A complete platform covering all your school's needs

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Features designed for the Guinean education context

academic.title: Complete academic management
academic.description: Grades, report cards, timetables, attendance — all school tracking digitized from preschool to university.

payments.title: Integrated Mobile Money payments
payments.description: Orange Money, Soutra Money, MTN MoMo + physical cash desk. Automatic reconciliation and instant receipts.

mobile.title: Mobile access for all
mobile.description: Smartphone-optimized interface. Parents track their children's schooling from their phone.

offline.title: Works offline
offline.description: Offline mode for low connectivity areas. Automatic sync when connection returns.

documents.title: Official documents
documents.description: Automatic generation of report cards, certificates, and receipts. Integrated electronic signature.

security.title: Secure and reliable
security.description: Encrypted data, automatic backups, role-based access control. Your data is protected.

register.title: Sign up
register.description: Create your free account in less than 2 minutes. No commitment required.

configure.title: Configure your school
configure.description: Add your classes, subjects, and teachers. Import your existing students.

optimize.title: Track and optimize
optimize.description: Manage grades, attendance, payments, and communications from a single dashboard.

stats.title: Kouroukan in numbers
stats.subtitle: A platform that grows with you

pricing.title: Pricing that fits your needs
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale at your own pace

cta.title: Ready to transform your school?
cta.subtitle: Join the schools that chose modernity. Free registration, no commitment.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.subtitle: Answers to your most common questions
